title: Gattenhoffia pluvialis

This family is further divided into 145 genera, with Gattenhoffia pluvialis belonging to the genus Gattenhoffia. Gattenhoffia pluvialis is a rare and lesser-known species of Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa. The classification of Gattenhoffia pluvialis is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the scientific community. Further classification may be made at the subspecies level as more information becomes available.
